title: Device Authorization Response DTO
description: 200 body for POST /api/v1/auth/device/authorize. The RFC 8628 field names are carried under data to match Traigent's standard success envelope.

device_code.description: Opaque device code used only by the polling CLI.

user_code.description: Short code displayed by the CLI and entered or confirmed in the portal.

verification_uri.description: Portal URL where the human approves the device authorization.

verification_uri_complete.description: Portal URL preloaded with the user_code for copy/paste or clickable CLI flows.

expires_in.description: Seconds until the device_code and user_code expire.

interval.description: Minimum seconds the CLI must wait between token polling requests.
